name: clevis
description: Delegates to the Clevis framework to unlock from a bound JWE — TPM2, Tang (network-bound), PKCS#11, or Shamir-threshold policies. The container holds only the JWE; the unlock secret is reconstructed from the bound device/server at boot.

vars.name: CEV_CLEVIS_JWE
vars.description: Path to the Clevis JWE that wraps the 32-byte key. Produced once with: `clevis encrypt tpm2 '{}' < rawkey > cev.jwe` (or `clevis encrypt tang '{"url":...}'`).
